overview: WordPlay is a mobile-first English vocabulary learning game on the Internet Computer with multiple game modes, admin panel, analytics, and secure authentication.
features: Secure admin login with BCrypt password hashing, AES-256 Gmail encryption, math challenge, and rate limiting
Multiple vocabulary game modes (Flashcards, Meaning Match, Memory Match, and more)
Admin panel for managing languages, vocabulary, quotes, and feedback
Analytics dashboard with per-user progress and global statistics
Dark and light mode theme switcher
